title: Pinterest Q4 2021 Earnings Results and Guidance
text: Pinterest announced fourth quarter and full year 2021 results showing mixed performance. U.S. monthly active users declined 12% year over year to 86 million in Q4 2021, primarily due to pandemic easing relative to the year ago quarter. Time spent on competing video app platforms and lower search traffic due to Google's November algorithm updates also contributed to year-on-year user declines. The distribution and placement of Idea Pins during the quarter had an estimated negative impact on fourth quarter year-over-year revenue growth in the mid-single digits. Despite these headwinds, Pinterest maintained its position as a major social media platform with solid international user growth.
